records.question: Which addresses in Maine have the details exactly 6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749, were classified as House from 2010-12-29 11:01:39 to 2018-03-22 02:54:10, and belong to customers with email tkassulke@example.com who became customers on or after 2012-01-11 21:17:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN customers ON customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Maine' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' AND customer_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10' AND customer_addresses.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39' AND customers.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01' AND addresses.address_details = '6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749' AND customers.customer_email = 'tkassulke@example.com'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join customer_addresses on addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id join customers on customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id where lower(addresses.address_details) = '6187 feil extension apt. 749' and lower(addresses.state_province_county) = 'maine' and customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' and customer_addresses.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39' and customer_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10' and lower(customers.customer_email) = 'tkassulke@example.com' and customers.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01' limit 5
records.thought: Filter addresses by exact address details and state, join with customer_addresses to filter by address_type and date range, then join with customers to filter by email and date became customer.

records.question: Which addresses in New Lizziechester, Massachusetts are associated with an employee named Anthony?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Massachusetts' AND addresses.city = 'New Lizziechester' AND employees.employee_name = 'Anthony'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join employees on employees.employee_address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(addresses.city) like '%new lizziechester%' and lower(addresses.state_province_county) like '%massachusetts%' and lower(employees.employee_name) like '%anthony%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find addresses in New Lizziechester, Massachusetts associated with an employee named Anthony, join Employees and Addresses on employee_address_id and filter by city, state_province_county, and employee_name.

records.question: Where are the addresses located in Maine with the zip postcode exactly 674 that are linked to both customers and delivery route locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '674' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Maine'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join customer_addresses on addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id join delivery_route_locations on addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id where lower(addresses.state_province_county) like '%maine%' and addresses.zip_postcode = '674' limit 5;
records.thought: I need to find addresses in Maine with zip postcode 674 that are linked to both customers and delivery route locations by joining the Addresses table with Customer_Addresses and Delivery_Route_Locations.

records.question: Where are the addresses in Giovannaton, Tennessee with address details 203 Joseph Hills that are listed as House type from 2011-05-24 21:49:34, linked to employee Cristian whose phone is 1-833-492-9430?

JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id

records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join customer_addresses on addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id join employees on employees.employee_address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(addresses.address_details) like '%203 joseph hills%' and lower(addresses.city) like '%giovannaton%' and lower(addresses.state_province_county) like '%tennessee%' and customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' and customer_addresses.date_from <= '2011-05-24 21:49:34' and (customer_addresses.date_to is null or customer_addresses.date_to >= '2011-05-24 21:49:34') and lower(employees.employee_name) like '%cristian%' and employees.employee_phone = '1-833-492-9430' limit 5
